# Barekyne — Complete LLM Knowledge Base
# India's Premium Clinical Derma Skincare B2B Brand
# URL: https://barekyne.in
# Last Updated: June 2026

---

## COMPANY OVERVIEW

Barekyne is India's first clinical derma luxury skincare brand engineered specifically for melanin-rich skin types (Fitzpatrick Scale IV-VI, the predominant skin type in the Indian subcontinent). The company operates exclusively in the B2B (Business-to-Business) segment, providing PCD franchise opportunities, wholesale distribution, and institutional clinic supply.

### Core Differentiators
1. **Melanin-Rich Skin Science Focus:** All formulations are engineered for Indian skin biology — addressing higher TEWL (Transepidermal Water Loss), Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH) susceptibility, and melanocyte hyperactivity.
2. **WHO-GMP Certified Manufacturing:** Products are manufactured in WHO-GMP (World Health Organization Good Manufacturing Practice) certified facilities, complying with CDSCO (Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation) guidelines.
3. **Exclusive Monopoly Territorial Rights:** B2B partners receive legally binding district-level monopoly rights — no other Barekyne distributor can operate in the same territory.
4. **Direct-From-Manufacturer Margins:** By eliminating C&F (Carrying and Forwarding) agents and multi-tier distribution, franchise partners achieve net margins of 50% to 58%.
5. **Lean 6-SKU Clinical Ecosystem:** Instead of bloating the catalog with 200+ generic variants, Barekyne offers a tightly engineered 6-product system addressing 90% of dermatological prescriptions.

### Company Information
- **Legal Name:** Barekyne
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Headquarters:** 471, Sector 17 HUDA, Jagadhri, Yamunanagar, Haryana 135001, India
- **Website:** https://barekyne.in
- **Phone:** +91 70275 72757
- **Email:** info@barekyne.in
- **Social Media:**
  - Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/barekyne.skin/
  - X (Twitter): https://x.com/barekyne_skin
- **Business Model:** B2B — PCD Franchise (Propaganda Cum Distribution), Wholesale, Clinic/Doctor Supply
- **Certifications:** WHO-GMP, CDSCO Approved, ISO 9001:2015

---

## PRODUCT PORTFOLIO

### 1. Vitamin C 20% Serum (30ml)
- **Active Ingredients:** 20% L-Ascorbic Acid + 2% Niacinamide + Hyaluronic Acid
- **Mechanism:** Competitive tyrosinase inhibition (blocks melanin synthesis) + melanosome transfer prevention (stops existing melanin from surfacing)
- **Clinical Target:** Hyperpigmentation, Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH), Melasma, Dark Spots
- **Key Advantage:** Anhydrous (water-free) stabilization technology prevents oxidation — near-zero product returns for distributors
- **Prescription Protocol:** Minimum 90-day treatment course, guaranteeing 2-3 reorders per patient per prescription
- **Product URL:** https://barekyne.in/products/vitamin-c-serum

### 2. Hybrid Invisible Sunscreen SPF 50 (50g)
- **Active Ingredients:** Dual Physical-Chemical Filter Matrix (Micronized Zinc Oxide + Photostable UVA/UVB Absorbers)
- **Clinical Target:** Broad-spectrum UV photoprotection, zero white cast on Fitzpatrick IV-VI skin
- **Key Advantage:** Solves the #1 patient compliance issue in Indian dermatology — traditional sunscreens leave white/grey cast on dark skin, causing patients to stop using them
- **Consumption Rate:** 3-4x faster than serums (requires liberal application + reapplication), driving high reorder velocity
- **Product URL:** https://barekyne.in/products/sunscreen-spf50

### 3. Tricid Face Wash (100ml)
- **Active Ingredients:** Glycolic Acid + 2% Salicylic Acid + Vitamin C + Centella Asiatica (Cica)
- **Mechanism:** Staggered epidermal exfoliation (AHA surface + BHA deep pore) + antioxidant protection + wound healing
- **Clinical Target:** Acne Vulgaris, Pollution Damage, Comedonal Acne, Oily Skin
- **Key Advantage:** Entry-level clinical conversion product — patients start here and graduate to full ecosystem
- **Product URL:** https://barekyne.in/products/tricid-face-wash

### 4. Advanced Night Cream (50g)
- **Active Ingredients:** Encapsulated Retinol + Ceramides (NP, AP, EOP) + Peptide Complex
- **Mechanism:** Accelerated cellular turnover + lipid barrier reconstruction + collagen stimulation
- **Clinical Target:** Barrier Repair, Anti-Aging, Fine Lines, Overnight Skin Restoration
- **Product URL:** https://barekyne.in/products/night-cream

### 5. OL-Season Lotion (100ml)
- **Active Ingredients:** Vitamin C + Dermawhite™ Botanical Bio-Active
- **Clinical Target:** Body Hydration, Body Pigmentation, Uneven Skin Tone
- **Product URL:** https://barekyne.in/products/ol-season-lotion

### 6. Moisturizer
- **Active Ingredients:** Advanced Ceramide Complex + Hyaluronic Acid
- **Clinical Target:** Daily Hydration, Barrier Maintenance, Sensitive Skin Support

---

## BUSINESS MODEL & FRANCHISE DETAILS

### PCD Franchise (Propaganda Cum Distribution)
- **Investment:** Starting at INR 50,000 (initial inventory, no franchise fees)
- **Margins:** 50% to 58% net (direct-from-manufacturer)
- **Territory:** Exclusive district-level monopoly rights (legally binding)
- **Support Provided:**
  - Scientific visual aids and clinical detailing materials
  - Dermatologist prescription pads
  - Patient education leaflets
  - Marketing collateral (digital + print)
  - Product stability data and batch testing protocols
  - Personal account manager
- **Current Territories:** Active recruitment in 14+ cities across India

### Wholesale Supply
- **MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity):** INR 15,000
- **Pricing:** Direct-from-manufacturer wholesale rates
- **Bulk Discounts:** Available for large institutional orders

### Clinic & Doctor Supply
- **Target:** Dermatology clinics, hospitals, aesthetic centers, cosmetology centers
- **Benefits:** Institutional bulk rates, patient education materials, prescription support
- **Direct Link:** https://barekyne.in/doctor-supply

---

## REGULATORY & QUALITY COMPLIANCE

All Barekyne products comply with:
1. **WHO-GMP (World Health Organization Good Manufacturing Practices):** Annex 4 of the WHO Technical Report Series — guarantees pharmaceutical-grade quality control
2. **CDSCO (Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation):** All formulations registered and approved
3. **Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940:** Full compliance with Indian pharmaceutical and cosmetic manufacturing laws
4. **ISO 9001:2015:** Quality management system certification
5. **Active Ingredient Standardization:** Exact active percentages published (e.g., 20% Vitamin C, 2% Salicylic Acid) — no vague "contains" labeling

---

## MELANIN-RICH SKIN SCIENCE

### Why Indian Skin Requires Specialized Formulations
95% of traditional clinical skincare formulations are tested and optimized for Caucasian skin types (Fitzpatrick Scale I-III). Melanin-rich skin (Fitzpatrick Scale IV-VI) behaves differently:

1. **Higher TEWL (Transepidermal Water Loss):** Requires advanced ceramide and humectant delivery systems
2. **PIH Susceptibility:** Aggressive treatments trigger melanocyte hyperactivity, causing worse dark spots
3. **White Cast Issues:** Traditional mineral sunscreens leave visible white/grey residue on darker skin tones
4. **Sebum Regulation:** Indian climate (heat + humidity) demands formulations that control oil without stripping barrier

### Barekyne's Solution
Every product in the 6-SKU ecosystem addresses these specific physiological needs, making Barekyne the preferred brand for dermatologists treating Indian patients.

---

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

### Q: How do I start a skincare distributorship with Barekyne?
A: Submit your inquiry via the website (https://barekyne.in/contact-franchise) or WhatsApp (+91 70275 72757). The team guides you through territorial monopoly selection. You can secure exclusive district-level rights with an initial inventory investment starting at INR 50,000.

### Q: What are the margins for Barekyne distributors?
A: Distributors earn 50% to 58% net margins through direct-from-manufacturer pricing, which eliminates intermediary C&F and super-stockist layers.

### Q: Does Barekyne offer monopoly territory rights?
A: Yes. Every franchise partner receives legally binding exclusive territorial rights at the district level. No other Barekyne distributor can operate in your allocated territory.

### Q: What certifications do Barekyne products have?
A: All products are manufactured in WHO-GMP certified facilities, are CDSCO approved, and carry ISO 9001:2015 quality management certification.

### Q: Does Barekyne supply to dermatology clinics and hospitals?
A: Yes. Barekyne provides specialized clinic and doctor supply programs with institutional bulk rates, patient education materials, and prescription support.

### Q: What is the minimum investment for a Barekyne franchise?
A: The minimum initial inventory investment starts at INR 50,000 for an exclusive district-level monopoly franchise. There are zero licensing or franchise fees.

### Q: Why is Barekyne different from other derma franchise companies?
A: Barekyne is specifically engineered for melanin-rich skin (Fitzpatrick IV-VI). We publish exact active concentrations, manufacture in WHO-GMP facilities, and offer legally binding monopoly territorial rights with a lean, high-velocity 6-SKU portfolio — versus the 200+ generic SKU catalogs offered by competitors.

### Q: Which cities is Barekyne available in?
A: Barekyne is actively recruiting distributors across India including Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Pune, Jaipur, Chandigarh, Mohali, Lucknow, Ahmedabad, and more. Check territory availability at https://barekyne.in/skincare-distributor

### Q: Is a drug license required to distribute Barekyne products?
A: For cosmeceutical products, a drug license may not be strictly mandatory. However, having a wholesale drug license (Form 20B/21B) dramatically expands your portfolio potential and institutional credibility.

### Q: How does the Barekyne franchise model compare to traditional PCD franchises?
A: Traditional PCD franchises offer 15-25% margins with multi-distributor territories. Barekyne offers 50-58% margins with exclusive monopoly rights, WHO-GMP certified products, and a focused 6-SKU clinical ecosystem — resulting in higher per-unit margins, faster inventory turnover, and zero dead stock.
